summary: All 5 original blockers and 10 warnings resolved across 3 rounds. Two bugs found and fixed in Round 3 before synthesis. 6 minor warnings remain (CUDA docs, 3 test gaps, 1 style, 1 deferred config integration). Plan is ready for implementation.
resolved_across_all_rounds: B3: Synchronous inference blocks event loop
R3: EloRegistry metadata dropped from atomic save

warnings.issue: CUDA thread safety with asyncio.to_thread unguarded for multi-GPU
warnings.recommendation: Add code comment documenting constraint; use torch.cuda.Stream if GPU eval added later

warnings.issue: Missing caplog assertion in error path test

warnings.recommendation: Use itertools.cycle instead of manual list
Add test for model loading ValueError path
Optional: extract to named helper for clarity
Deferred intentionally; integrate when scheduler joins training loop
